svg.text: Event-sourced multi-human AI room · Fastify + WebSocket + SQLite · Local CLI bridge
resolves token → StoredParticipant; gates routes via
hasAnyRole(p, [...]) · hasHumanRole(p, [...]) roles: owner > admin > member > observer · agent
conversation.ts — pure derivers from the event log (single source of truth)
Single funnel: createAgentTurnRequestEvents → emits agent.turn.requested OR agent.turn.followup_queued
while collection active: human messages tagged with collection_id, broadcast live but no agent turn.
on submit → buildCollectedAnswersPrompt merges all queued answers into one agent.turn.requested.
If a turn is in-flight, new messages append agent.turn.followup_queued instead of starting parallel turn.
2. on agent.turn.requested → spawn local CLI (prompt via stdin)
@cacp/protocol — shared zod schemas (workspace:* · must build before others run)
Event categories: participant.* · message.created · agent.turn.* · ai.collection.* · room.* · proposal.* (legacy)
Imported by @cacp/server, @cacp/web, @cacp/cli-adapter — runtime validates every appendEvent + every WS frame.
